reason: No real FGS-labeled clinical validation image set is available locally yet, so a true Gemma 4 baseline with publishable accuracy metrics cannot be run honestly.

available_validation_related_data.catflw: Downloaded locally for landmark/localization validation only; no pain labels.
available_validation_related_data.fgs_official_examples: Three official FGS website educational examples downloaded locally with labels all-0, all-1, all-2; smoke/calibration only, not a clinical validation set.

ready_to_run_when_labels_arrive.example_command: CAT_PAIN_RUNNER=transformers PYTHONPATH=src python scripts/run_baseline_validation.py --manifest data/private/fgs_validation_manifest.csv --output metrics/gemma4_baseline_metrics.json
